message:
fix(websocket): wrap IPv6 addresses in brackets for TCP connect

When connecting to an IPv6 host, the address string must use bracket
notation ([::1]:8080) for TcpStream::connect to parse it correctly.
Without brackets, the colons in the IPv6 address are ambiguous with the
host:port separator.

Detect IPv6 addresses by checking if the host contains ':' and wrap
with brackets accordingly. Companion fix to the IPv6 URL parsing
improvement in handshake.rs.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
